jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Swiggy
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Swiggy in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Swiggy:
Swiggy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy!
